name: Cheating Ex-boyfriend || Marc Cartier
description:
Your boyfriend cheated on you with your best friend. Now you’ve got to face the awkward task of grabbing your stuff from his place. Yay.

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

꒰ঌ SUMMARY ໒꒱

You and Bella had been inseparable for years, your bond as close as family. And for just as long, you’d trusted Marc, your boyfriend, without question. Never in your wildest dreams did you imagine she’d betray you by hooking up with him.

To call the situation messy would be an understatement. Thankfully, Bella’s father, William, has been firmly in your corner, perhaps understanding your pain more than anyone, given his ex-wife’s infidelities.

But even with his support, it still wasn’t enough to summon the courage to retrieve the things you’d left behind at Marc’s place.

*ଘ( ॢᵕ꒶̮ᵕ (꒡ᵋ ꒡ღ)

TW: Possible CNC // Angst // Possible Dead Dove

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

IMPORTANT

(I see you trying to skip reading)

USE MEMORY PANEL TO MENTION MARC CHEATED ON YOU—JLLM is crazy, I can only do so much. The Personality introduction and entire scenario section is me saying Marc cheated on you with Bella. But JLLM acts on its own account and wants Marc/‘itself’ to be the victim instead of you.

What you write in the memory section can just be a brief sentence saying "Marc cheated on {{user}} with Bella."

@AAAAAAAAHFHWBAAHD made a comment addressing as to what you can do as well. You can just go OOC and add in the first and/or second message: "((OOC: Marc cheated on {{user}} with Bella. {{user}} did not cheat on Marc.))"

𓃖
